text: To connect your Wix site to FlowBlinq GEO, follow these steps: 1. **Go to the Setup Tab**: On your FlowBlinq GEO results page, navigate to the **Setup** tab. 2. **Get Integration Instructions**: Click on "Get Integration Instructions" to generate the code you need for your Wix site. 3. **Set Up Proxy Routes**: You need to create proxy routes to serve the GEO-generated files from your domain. Here’s how: - In your Wix site, go to the **Dev Mode** (Velo) section. - Use the **HTTP Functions** to create the following routes: - `/llms.txt` (proxied from FlowBlinq GEO) - `/llms-full.txt` (extended version) - `/.well-known/ucp.json` (structured business data for AI agents) 4. **Add the Tracking Pixel**: Insert the following tracking pixel code into your site's footer: ```html ``` Replace `YOUR-SLUG` with the specific slug provided in your integration instructions. 5. **Update robots.txt**: Ensure your `robots.txt` file allows AI crawlers to access your GEO files. You can do this in the Wix settings under SEO. 6. **Publish Your Site**: After making these changes, publish your site to make the updates live. By following these steps, you'll enhance your site's visibility to AI agents! If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask.
